text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've made it to spring of Mayano Top Gun's
senior year. Recently, her training has been...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Boring! Running around the track three times is no
fun!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Let me do thirty! I can do it now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What?! Then hurry up and think of something else
we can do for training!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I know you'll make me do something fun!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I've already mastered everything on the list
you gave me yesterday. Other than that... ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Her days of requesting new training methods
from me continue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if Mayano Top Gun has set herself a goal, it's
my job as her trainer to support her.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Morning, Trainer! Let's give it our all today!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Trainer? You look really pale...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh my. That was close.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You almost fell over.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, no need to thank me. You're surprisingly
light.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? There are dark circles around your eyes. You
don't seem to be getting proper sleep.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Come here, Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: W-waaah!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Don't be scared! I just want a word!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: There you go, Trainer. You rest here a little.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'll take care of her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, don't worry. I'm not gonna eat her or
anything.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, that challenge she laid down
after the Arima Kinen was... quite tantalizing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's why I want to be in the mix too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can let you keep such an
interesting girl all to yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whaaaa?! Hishiama?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Nooo... I mean, sorry! It's just I'm completely
devoted to my trainer—and only to my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Calm down. I'm just making a suggestion. Don't
you want to improve?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, Trainer? Will you entrust her to me for a
bit?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon. The Queen of the Amazons. Narita
Brian's rival at the Arima Kinen both this year and
last.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to think about what's best for Mayano Top
Gun. Instead of obsessing over my own plans, it
might be necessary to put her in Hishi Amazon's
care.
choice_data_list: I leave her in your hands.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: There ya go! Let Hishiama's training begin!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Which means, Mayano, you're gonna run, and I'm
gonna chase you. If I grab your tail, I win.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You mean tail tag? I haven't played that since I
was in kindergarten...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Does that really count as training? Isn't that just
playing?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh? You underestimate me. Let's try it out.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Urk...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. What do we have here? You've already
been caught more than ten times!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's because you're not playing fair, Hishiama!
You can't just add more people to be it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Haha! I'll get you next, Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, you guys look like you're having fun.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama, would you mind if I joined you? I'd love
to help.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Of course! Thanks! Now, Mayano...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Your weakness is your lack of awareness.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Awareness?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I know how to be aware. And I know how to play
this game.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're the one suddenly adding more people to
be it and changing the rules! I don't even wanna—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, that's why... You know what? It's fine.
You're purposefully closing your eyes to it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: To what?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
From what I can tell, you've been blessed with
both talent and an excellent trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
With those two things, you can do anything.
That's why the adults around you do so much for
you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: In turn, you've gotten spoilt.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Take now, for example. If only you just tried to
grasp the situation...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Basically, you've fallen into the habit of
dismissing that which you don't already know.
You aren't even trying to learn anything new.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We're not playing tail tag right now. We're
training for a race.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Think. In a real race, you have loads of other
racers coming for you. Their strategies change in
real time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So what do you do? You react to those changes,
twist your body, run away, and so on... Right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...And now think about this morning.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Do you not realize that your trainer has been
working so hard because of you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're a brilliant runner. But will you put your
brilliance to use?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Or will you be a child who just cries and gives up,
causing even more pain to her trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Nooo! Definitely not!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna grow up! I'm not gonna cry!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama! Let's do it one more time! I won't let
you catch me again!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Haha, all right. I'll give you a head start!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No! Let's do it right! I've figured it out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! That's what I wanted to hear! Feel it not
in your mind, but in your body!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Under the glowing sunset, Mayano Top Gun and
her friends run around the track over and over
until they're dripping with sweat.
